title: 区域洞察 API Key 配置
description: 请输入从数据平台生成的区域洞察 API Key。Key 仅保存在您本机，WorkBuddy 在连接时将其注入请求头；Key 失效时请通过下方链接重新生成并更新。
description_en: Enter a Region Insight API Key generated on the data platform. It is stored only on your local machine and injected into request headers when WorkBuddy connects. If it expires or is revoked, use the link below to generate and enter a new key.
docLabel_en: How to get an API Key?

fields.label: 区域洞察 API Key
fields.description: 前往数据平台的 API Key 页面生成并复制完整 Key；请勿填写账号密码。
fields.description_en: Generate an API Key on the data platform API Key page and paste the complete value here. Do not enter your account password.
fields.placeholder: 粘贴 API Key，例如 sk-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
fields.placeholder_en: Paste the API Key, for example sk-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
